content.json:
## 🛡️ UDCSP — Platform health

Live operator view of request volume, latency, exceptions and dependency health across the in-region App Insights for this country. Telemetry comes from the voice orchestrator (Container App) and any other component wired with `APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING` pointing at this resource. Switch the time range below; empty charts mean no traffic in the selected window — play a flow on the live SPA or dial the toll-free voice number, then refresh.

content.query:
requests
| summarize Requests=count(), p95Ms=percentile(duration,95)
| extend Metric='Requests', Value=tostring(Requests), Sub=strcat('p95 ', tostring(round(p95Ms,0)), ' ms')
| project Metric, Value, Sub

exceptions
| summarize Exceptions=count()
| extend Metric='Exceptions', Value=tostring(Exceptions), Sub=''
| project Metric, Value, Sub

dependencies
| summarize Dependencies=count(), Failed=countif(success==false)
| extend Metric='Dependencies', Value=tostring(Dependencies), Sub=strcat(tostring(Failed), ' failed')
| project Metric, Value, Sub

customEvents
| summarize Events=count()
| extend Metric='Custom events', Value=tostring(Events), Sub=''
| project Metric, Value, Sub

requests
| summarize Requests=count() by bin(timestamp, 1m), cloud_RoleName=coalesce(cloud_RoleName, 'unknown')
| order by timestamp asc

requests
| summarize p50=percentile(duration,50), p95=percentile(duration,95), p99=percentile(duration,99) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| order by timestamp asc

dependencies
| summarize n=count() by type, success
| order by n desc

exceptions
| project timestamp, type, outerMessage, cloud_RoleName, operation_Id
| order by timestamp desc
| take 50

content.json:
---
## 🔗 Cross-resource view (Phase A — Log Analytics)

The panels below pull from the per-country Log Analytics workspace populated by the Phase A diagnostic-settings (AOAI · APIM · ACS · Logic Apps). They're cross-resource queries against the platform-shared NO LAW (`udcsp-no-prod-law`) — AOAI is platform-shared by design, see `docs/biz/voice.md §11.2`. For country-segregated APIM views, use the per-country LAW directly in Azure Monitor → Logs.
### AOAI — token consumption by model deployment

content.query:
workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES"
| where Category in ("RequestResponse", "AzureOpenAIRequestUsage")
| where isnotempty(ModelDeploymentName_s)
| summarize Calls=count(), TotalTokens=sum(toint(coalesce(properties_s.totalTokens, properties_s.prompt_tokens))) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ModelDeploymentName_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc

content.json: ### APIM gateway — hits per API operation (last hour by default — driven by the TimeRange picker)

content.query:
workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where IsRequestSuccess == true or ResponseCode >= 400
| extend StatusBucket = case(ResponseCode < 300, "2xx", ResponseCode < 400, "3xx", ResponseCode < 500, "4xx", "5xx")
| summarize Hits=count() by ApiId, StatusBucket
| order by Hits desc
| take 50

workspace("/subscriptions/00b9d21c-db88-4467-9cb8-8e80c7f84190/resourceGroups/udcsp-no-observability-rg/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/udcsp-no-prod-law").AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.LOGIC" and Category == "WorkflowRuntime"
| where OperationName has "workflowRunCompleted"
| extend workflow = tostring(split(Resource, "/")[2])
| summarize Runs=count() by workflow, status_s
| order by Runs desc

content.json: > 🤖 **Agent-level telemetry (free, native, refresh in seconds):** open the [Foundry observability portal](https://ai.azure.com/explore/aiservices/udcspai/observability) for per-agent runs, tokens, latency p50/p95, errors and cost.
